## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependencies, config
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no functional change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
